summaries.title: Guard optional orchestrator methods before calling them
summaries.summary: When calling methods on optional orchestrator sub-modules, always guard with `typeof orchestrator.subModule.method === "function"` before invocation, even if the parent object exists. This prevents a single missing or non-function method from crashing an entire aggregation endpoint, as seen when `orchestrator.learningGateway.health()` threw a TypeError and broke the dashboard overview. Use fallback values like `null` or defaults when the method is unavailable.
